estimated_cost_impact_reasoning: Partial CDMO disruption: 15% capacity reduction at WuXi STA increases scheduling risk and may require buffer stock or secondary CDMO for overflow. Estimated cost: +$245/kg API (expedite fees + secondary CDMO premium on 15% of volume).
estimated_timeline_reasoning: 6-week buffer stock window before schedule impact materialises at current batch throughput. If 483 escalates to Warning Letter, full CDMO removal scenario (+$820/kg, 18 weeks) activates.
caveats: Impact escalates significantly if Form 483 becomes Warning Letter or Import Alert.
Capacity reduction currently affects API intermediate range (C3–C8 steps) — Amide Coupling step impact unconfirmed.
WuXi STA investor communications suggest US bookings suspended — escalation risk is HIGH.
